hero.title: Premium Carbon Charcoal & Coconut Export
hero.subtitle: Indonesia's trusted exporter of premium coconut shell carbon charcoal and mature coconut, supplying B2B partners across the globe.

about_preview.title: Your Trusted Partner in Carbon Charcoal & Mature Coconut Supply
about_preview.desc: Based in Indonesia, we specialize in exporting premium coconut shell carbon charcoal and mature coconuts to the global market. We maintain strict quality control from our plantations directly to your port, ensuring you get the best nature has to offer.

why_us.title: Why Choose Cococarbone?
why_us.subtitle: We ensure reliability, quality, and seamless logistics for every B2B partner worldwide.

cards.c1_desc: Strictly sorted and processed to meet international B2B standards.
cards.c2_desc: Consistent volume capacity to support your continuous business operations.
cards.c3_desc: Experienced in handling export documentation and global shipping (FOB/CIF).
cards.c4_desc: Sustainable sourcing and environmentally responsible processing.

products_preview.title: Explore Our Premium Commodities
products_preview.subtitle: High-quality natural resources processed to meet global standards.

charcoal.title: Coconut Shell Carbon Charcoal
charcoal.desc: Premium carbon charcoal made from 100% natural coconut shells for shisha and BBQ, offering high heat and ultra-low ash.

coconut.title: Mature Coconut
coconut.desc: Export-grade mature coconuts with thick meat and high water content-ideal for industrial processing, coconut oil, and desiccated coconut production.

footer.company_desc: Exporting Indonesia's finest agricultural products to the world.
footer.address: Jalan Bajak 2 H, Komplek ITM No. A2, Medan - North Sumatera

charcoal_page.title: Coconut Shell Carbon Charcoal
charcoal_page.desc: Premium grade carbon charcoal specially crafted for Shisha/Hookah and BBQ. Produced using 100% natural coconut shells from Indonesia, delivering exceptional long burn time, intense & stable heat, zero chemical additives, and ultra-low ash residue.

coconut_page.title: Mature Coconut
coconut_page.desc: Export-grade mature coconuts sourced from the finest plantations across Indonesia. Characterized by thick white coconut meat and abundant water content, our mature coconuts are perfectly suited for industrial processing-including coconut oil extraction, desiccated coconut, coconut milk, and other coconut-based derivatives.

about_page.title: About CV. Gemilang Indo Nusantara
about_page.subtitle: Connecting Indonesia's rich natural resources with the global market.
about_page.story_desc: Cococarbone operates under CV. Gemilang Indo Nusantara, a legally registered export company in Indonesia. We started with a vision to empower local farmers and deliver the highest quality agricultural commodities to international buyers. With strict quality control and a deep understanding of global logistics, we ensure every shipment meets your expectations.
about_page.vision_desc: To be the most trusted and reliable supplier of Indonesian agricultural products worldwide, promoting sustainable and fair trade.
about_page.mission_desc: Delivering premium quality continuously, maintaining transparent B2B relationships, and ensuring on-time global delivery.
about_page.values_subtitle: The principles that guide our every move in the global market.
about_page.legal_desc: Cococarbone operates legally under CV. Gemilang Indo Nusantara, officially registered with the Ministry of Law and Human Rights of the Republic of Indonesia. This ensures our global partners of our compliance, transparency, and business legitimacy.
about_page.facility_desc: Take a glimpse into our production lines and warehouses where we process, sort, and package our premium commodities to ensure the highest quality before shipping to your port.

quality.title: Uncompromised Quality
quality.desc: We maintain rigorous standards from plantation to port, ensuring only the finest products reach our clients.

sustainability.title: Eco-Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Our processes are designed to be environmentally friendly, supporting the long-term health of our planet.

integrity.title: Global Integrity
integrity.desc: Transparency and honesty are at the heart of our B2B relationships worldwide.

products_page.title: Our Catalog
products_page.subtitle: Browse our selection of premium export-ready commodities.

contact_page.title: Get In Touch
contact_page.subtitle: Ready to order or need a custom quotation? We are here to help.
contact_page.newsletter_desc: Stay updated with our latest products, market insights, and export news.

candlenut_page.title: Premium Whole Candlenut
candlenut_page.desc: High-quality candlenuts sourced from the best plantations in Eastern Indonesia. Our candlenuts are carefully processed to maintain their natural oil content and creamy white color, perfect for industrial oil extraction and culinary excellence.

packaging.bag: Double Layer Plastic or Gunny Bag

how_to_buy.title: How to Order
how_to_buy.subtitle: We've designed our premium coconut carbon charcoal ordering process to be transparent, secure, and straightforward for B2B partners worldwide. Follow our structured steps to ensure your order arrives on time.
how_to_buy.completed: You've reviewed all steps! Ready to start doing business? Contact us now.

steps.s1_desc: Contact our team and provide the product specifications you need (Grade, size, packaging type), along with estimated order volume and destination port.
steps.s2_desc: Our expert team will discuss pricing, production capacity, and private label options if needed. We are also ready to send product samples so you can test quality firsthand.
steps.s3_desc: Once an agreement is reached, we will issue a Proforma Invoice / Sales Contract. You may make a Down Payment (DP) or open an L/C according to the payment terms.
steps.s4_desc: We immediately begin production, QC quality testing, and packaging. The products are then loaded into containers along with complete export documentation.
